pwa.title: Install PwNotify
pwa.subtitle: Add it to your home screen — quick access, full screen.

ios.title: How to install (Safari):
ios.step1: Tap the Share icon at the bottom

android.title: How to install (Chrome):
android.step1: Tap the menu (⋮) at the top right
android.step2: Choose “Install app” or “Add to Home screen”

twofa.title: Two-factor authentication
twofa.description: Extra sign-in protection with an authenticator app.
twofa.scanPrompt: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app:
twofa.disablePrompt: Enter a current code (or recovery code) to disable 2FA.
twofa.recoveryWarning: Store these safely — each code works once. They are only shown now.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: Who changed what, and when. Entries are immutable and cannot be deleted.

empty.title: No entries
empty.description: No events were recorded for the selected filters.

login.useLocalAccount: Sign in with a local account
login.brandHeadline: Stay on top of password expiry.
login.brandSubtext: Automatic, staged reminders for your Microsoft Entra ID users — before the password expires.
login.ssoDenied: No access — not a member of the admin group.
login.twoFactorPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
login.recoveryHint: No access to the app? Use one of your recovery codes.
login.idleLogout: You were signed out automatically due to inactivity.

enroll.prompt: Two-factor authentication is required for this account. Please set it up now — scan the code with your authenticator app.
enroll.manual: If you cannot scan, enter this key manually:
enroll.recoveryHint: Keep these codes somewhere safe. Each works exactly once and replaces your authenticator app if you lose access to it. They are shown this one time only.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of password expiry and notifications.
dashboard.noData: No data yet — start a sync on the Users page.

errors.superadmin_must_be_local: A superadmin must be a local account.

errors.password_policy: The password does not meet the policy (at least 10 characters, upper/lowercase letter, digit, special character).
errors.sso_no_reset: SSO accounts reset their password through Microsoft Entra.
errors.email_required: No email address is set for this account.
errors.user_not_in_scope: Account outside your own customer scope.

access.title: User management
access.description: Local accounts and accounts authorized via SSO.
access.noSsoUsers: No SSO users. Sync once SSO is active.
access.cannotDelete: The last user / your own account cannot be deleted
access.inviteHint: The recipient chooses their own username and password when accepting the invitation.
access.resetPendingHint: Invitation not yet accepted — no password to reset.
access.resetNoEmailHint: No email on file — add one before resetting.

account.avatarDesc: Shown in the top right and in your account.
account.nameDesc: Your display name in the app.
account.pwTooShort: New password must be at least 10 characters
account.sessionsDesc: Devices signed in to this account.
account.profileDesc: Your name and picture as they appear in the app.
account.profileDescSso: Taken from your Microsoft Entra account.

profile.title: My account
profile.subtitle: Signed in as {{name}}{{sso}} · manage active sessions.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: All reminder emails that were sent.

empty.title: No notifications
empty.description: No reminders have been sent yet.
empty.filteredDescription: No notifications found for the selected filters.

empty.title: No runs
empty.description: Start the first run using the button above.

backendStatus.secretSoon: The Graph client secret expires in {{count}} days ({{date}}). The sync will fail after that — please store a new secret in time.
backendStatus.secretExpired: The Graph client secret expired on {{date}}. The sync will keep failing until a new secret is stored.

settingsPage.readOnlyNotice: As an auditor you have read-only access to the settings. Only administrators can save changes.

graph.title: Microsoft Graph
graph.description: App registration (client credentials flow) for reading users and sending mail.
graph.secretExpiresHint: Found in Entra under "Certificates & secrets". PwNotify then warns you in time — if the secret expires unnoticed, the sync fails and no reminders go out. The date is maintained by hand because reading it automatically would require permission to read every app registration in the tenant.

group.title: Sync scope (user group)
group.description: Sync and check for password expiry only members of an Entra group — instead of all tenant users. Leave empty = all users.
group.objectIdHint: Entra → Groups → desired group → copy object ID. Nested groups are resolved (transitive members).

permWarning.title: Additional permission required:
permWarning.text1: To read the group members, the app registration needs the application permission
permWarning.text2: (Microsoft Graph, with admin consent) — in addition to the three standard permissions. Without it, the sync fails with “403 / Insufficient privileges”.

template.heading: Template: dynamic group (captures members automatically)
template.intro4: insert one of the following templates.
template.rule1Title: 1 · Base rule — ready to use, no placeholders
template.rule1Desc: Captures only active, licensed users. Shared mailboxes (without a license) and disabled accounts are excluded automatically.
template.rule2Title: 2 · Template with placeholders — adapt for production
template.rule2Desc1: Additionally restrict to a domain and/or department. Replace the
template.placeholderDept2: field — or omit this line entirely
template.static2: also works, into which you manually add the users to be checked. The reconciliation happens on the next sync.

ssoTab.title: SSO — Sign in with Microsoft
ssoTab.description: Uses the same app registration as Graph. Only members of the specified Entra group may sign in via SSO.

enable.title: Enable SSO
enable.description: Shows the Microsoft button on the login page.

publicUrl.label: Public app URL (domain)
publicUrl.hint: e.g. https://domain.example.com — determines the SSO redirect URI and the links in emails. Empty = local address.

adminGroup.label: Admin group object ID
adminGroup.hint: Entra → Groups → desired group → object ID.

setup.heading: Additionally configure in the app registration:
setup.step4e: . Without it, the sync fails with “403 / Insufficient privileges”.
setup.photoNote1: Profile pictures of SSO users are loaded via the already required permission
setup.photoNote2: — no additional API permission is needed for this.

auditorGroup.label: Auditor group object ID (optional)
auditorGroup.hint: Members get the read-only auditor role. Entra → Groups → object ID.

toast.upToDate: You are running the latest version.

autoCheck.title: Automatically check for updates
autoCheck.description: Periodically compares with the latest GitHub release and shows a notice window when a newer version exists. Calls the public GitHub API for this.

retention.title: Retention of personal data
retention.description: All periods are off by default (0 = keep forever). Deletion cannot be undone.
retention.userDaysHint: Accounts that stop appearing in the sync for this long are treated as departed and removed with all their data. Only runs after a successful sync, and never deletes more than half the records — a broken sync must not empty the database. 0 = never delete.
retention.logDaysHint: The history holds UPNs and recipient addresses. 0 = keep forever.
retention.auditDaysHint: Compliance usually wants an unbroken history — only set this if a deletion deadline applies. 0 = keep forever.

security.title: Sign-in security
security.description: Applies to local accounts. SSO accounts are exempt — their two-factor authentication is handled by Microsoft Entra.
security.require2faHint: Local accounts without 2FA must set it up at their next sign-in. Until then no session is created: after the password, the path leads straight into enrolment. Existing sessions continue until they expire.

multiTenant.title: Multi-tenancy
multiTenant.description: Superadmin-only. Controls, instance-wide, whether the tenant switcher, tenant navigation, and assignments are active at all.
multiTenant.modeHint: When off (default), PwNotify looks exactly like a single-tenant instance for every account — no tenant switcher, no tenant navigation, no assignments.
multiTenant.defaultNameHint: The default tenant is this instance's migration anchor and cannot be deleted. Its name appears, for example, in the tenant switcher once multi-tenancy is active.

entraGuide.title: Entra app registration — step by step
entraGuide.importantNote3: must be granted — otherwise the sync fails.

permissions.userReadAll: Read users, UPN, last password change
permissions.domainReadAll: Determine the domain's password validity period
permissions.groupMemberReadAll: Only with sync group & SSO — read group members

steps.step1: Open the Entra admin center → “App registrations” → “New registration”.
steps.step2: Assign a name (e.g. “PwNotify”) and register the app (this tenant only).
steps.step3: On the overview, copy the “Application (client) ID” and the “Directory (tenant) ID”.
steps.step4: Under “Certificates & secrets” → create a “New client secret” and copy the value immediately.
steps.step5: Under “API permissions”, add the application permissions (Microsoft Graph → Application permissions). GroupMember.Read.All only if you use a sync group or SSO.
steps.step6: Click “Grant admin consent” — the status column must be green.

mailTab.title: Email delivery
mailTab.passwordHint: Set — leave empty to keep it.

scheduleTab.title: Schedule
scheduleTab.description: When PwNotify checks and how reminders are staggered.

cron.label: Cron expression
cron.hint: 5 fields: minute hour day month weekday

dryRun.title: Dry-run mode
dryRun.description: Compute and log everything, but do not send any emails.

passwordPolicy.title: Password policy
passwordPolicy.description: Detect the validity period from the domain configuration or set it manually.

manualValidity.label: Manual validity period (days)
manualValidity.hint: Set this if passwords never expire in the tenant — otherwise there is no expiry date. Overrides auto-detection.

shared.title: Shared mailboxes
shared.description: Detected shared/room/equipment mailboxes are hidden from the user list (their own view in the status filter) and not notified. Applies on the next sync.

detectUnlicensed.title: Detect automatically (mailbox without license)
detectUnlicensed.description: Account with a mailbox but no assigned license → shared mailbox. Reliable, since regular users need a license for a mailbox.

patterns.label: Additional patterns (optional, glob e.g. noreply@*)
patterns.hint: Manual override — applies in addition to automatic detection.

brandingTab.title: Branding
brandingTab.description: Appearance in the app, login, and emails.

primaryColor.label: Primary color
primaryColor.hint: Sets the color scheme of the entire app including charts.

resetUrl.label: Password reset URL
resetUrl.hint: Target of the button in the email.

language.title: Notification language
language.description: Defines which language template a recipient receives — regardless of which template you are currently editing below.

perUser.title: Language per user
perUser.description: Uses the language stored in Entra (preferredLanguage) for the user. If no language is stored, the default language applies.

defaultLang.label: Default language
defaultLang.hint: Fallback, or for everyone when language per user is disabled.

template.title: Email template
template.description: Subject and HTML with live preview. Multilingual (DE/EN).

invite.title: Accept invitation
invite.subtitle: Set up your account to get started.
invite.invalidDescription: This invitation link is invalid or has expired. Please contact your administrator for a new invitation.
invite.usernameTaken: This username is already taken. Please choose another one.
invite.accepted: Account created. You can sign in now.

passwordReset.title: Set a new password
passwordReset.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
passwordReset.invalidDescription: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please ask your administrator for a new link.
passwordReset.success: Password changed successfully. You can sign in now.

setup.title: Initial setup
setup.subtitle: Ready to go in just a few steps.

db.title: Database
db.description: Check the connection and initialize the schema.

admin.title: Create superadmin
admin.description: This account is the global superadmin and manages the entire instance.
admin.companyNameHint: Name of your main tenant — can be changed later anytime in Settings → General.
admin.passwordTooShort: Password does not meet all requirements

graph.title: Connect Microsoft Graph
graph.description: Without this connection PwNotify cannot read users or send emails.
graph.optionalDescription: Everything here is optional and can be changed later in the settings.
graph.publicUrlHint: For links in emails and the SSO redirect. Leave empty to use the internal URL.
graph.groupHint: Only synchronize members of this Entra group. Leave empty for all users. Requires GroupMember.Read.All.
graph.ssoToggleDescription: Sign in with a Microsoft account — uses the same app registration. Requires GroupMember.Read.All and the groups claim in the token.
graph.ssoGroupHint: Only members of this group may sign in via SSO.
graph.redirectHint: Register this redirect URI in the Entra app registration (Web platform):
graph.ssoAuditorGroupHint: Members get read-only auditor access. Leave empty = no SSO auditors.

done.heading: All set!
done.description: PwNotify is set up. The initial sync runs automatically — users and SSO users are being loaded. No emails are sent yet; the schedule takes care of that.

users.title: Users
users.description: All Entra ID users and their password expiry status.
users.emptyDescription: Start a sync to load users from Entra ID.

alertsTab.title: Admin notifications
alertsTab.description: Notify selected email addresses about scheduled runs and failures. Recipients are plain email addresses and independent of login accounts.

enabled.title: Enable admin notifications
enabled.description: When disabled, no admin notifications are sent.

recipients.label: Recipients
recipients.hint: Email addresses that receive notifications. Independent of login accounts. Add with Enter, remove via the X.

digest.title: Summary after each scheduled run
digest.description: Send a summary to the recipients after each scheduled run.

onFailure.title: Immediate alert on failed run/delivery
onFailure.description: Notify recipients immediately when a run or a delivery fails.

tenants.title: Customer management
tenants.defaultProtected: The default customer cannot be deleted or deactivated.
tenants.name: Name
tenants.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens (e.g. customer-inc). Cannot be changed later.
tenants.entraTenantIdHint: Optional. Used for automatic SSO mapping.
tenants.deleteConfirmDescription: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted, including all associated data (accounts, notifications, runs, exclusions, settings). {{count}} SSO-linked users will lose their association with this customer. This action cannot be undone.

groups.title: Groups
groups.helper: Membership is managed in Entra — assign which customers this team sees here.
groups.name: Name
groups.entraGroupIdHint: Free text — the ID of the Entra security group.
groups.deleteConfirmDescription: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

settingsTab.title: Settings
settingsTab.description: The mode switch and default customer name are managed centrally in the instance settings.

superadmins.title: Superadmins
superadmins.lastHint: Last superadmin — cannot be demoted or deleted.
